description: Stores base resume variants and the Resume Selection Rules config document. Claude reads from this on every job review.

special_rows.notes: This row stores the master configuration document generated during onboarding. Claude reads it before every job review.

properties.name: Resume Name
properties.notes: e.g. 'Director of Engineering - Base', 'Senior Engineering Manager - Base', 'Resume Selection Rules v1.0'

options.name: Other
options.notes: Used for Resume Selection Rules and non-resume documents

properties.name: Version
properties.notes: e.g. 'v1.0', 'v1.1'. Increment when making significant changes.

properties.name: Resume Content
properties.notes: Full plain text of the resume OR full text of the rules document. Claude reads this field.

options.name: Yes
options.notes: Claude will use this resume for selection

options.name: No
options.notes: Archived — Claude will not use this resume

properties.name: Notes
properties.notes: Human notes about this resume variant or document
